summary: Final verdict pass for task-003 (bundle regeneration + verification). Closure packet complete, 3/3 reviewers approved, self-check 5/5, gate pass, 7/7 ACs independently verified. Stale bundled binary now reflects task-001 stdin-first CLI. Open risks documented and non-blocking.
rationale: All closure criteria met. Reviews unanimous. Self-check confidence maxed. Gate verdict pass (Tier 0 + Tier 2; Tier 1 skipped per closure_ready profile). Acceptance criteria: AC1 build exit 0; AC2 bundle exit 0 mtime refreshed; AC3 bundled grep only whitelisted hits (baseline 15 down to 4, all event/context/packet); AC4 repo-wide grep 0 JSON-input violations; AC5 31/31 tests pass; AC6 three stdin forms (pipe/heredoc/redirection) all exit 0; AC7 TTY simulation non-zero exit with NO_STDIN stderr and no SIGTERM kill. No unresolved blocking concerns. Challenger skipped per risk=normal policy. Ship.
